verification.target_vocab_notes: 銀行 appears in 銀行員 (bank employee). Target vocabulary is clearly present as part of compound word.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはぎんこういんです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, です copula. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple identification sentence. Very clear and practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for occupations.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 銀行 appears in the middle of the sentence.
verification.kana_notes: Major error: いっっていった has extra っ. Should be いっていった (入って行った).
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, に particle, te-form (入って), ta-form (行った). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Compound verb construction but with basic N5 verbs.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error with extra っ. Otherwise good N5 sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 銀行 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはぎんこうではたらいています。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (働いています - is working/works). Progressive/state ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 大切 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: どうぞおからだをたいせつに。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: どうぞ, を particle, に particle. Elliptical (omitted verb) but acceptable N5 set phrase.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-high N5. Set phrase with polite お prefix. Elliptical but commonly used.
verification.overall_notes: Common polite expression. Acceptable N5 despite elliptical structure.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 大切 appears at the beginning modifying 話.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: たいせつなはなしがあるんです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: na-adjective (大切な), が particle, ある, んです explanatory. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Explanatory んです adds slight complexity but is acceptable N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with na-adjective and explanatory ending.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 大切 appears in the middle modifying 人.
verification.kana_notes: Error: たいせつなにんです should be たいせつなひとです. The kanji 人 should be ひと not にん.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, の particle, na-adjective (大切な), です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple descriptive sentence with possessive.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error. 人 should be ひと not にん in this context.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 学生 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あるがくせいにあうところです。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ところです (about to/just). This temporal pattern is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ところです pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ところです temporal pattern. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 学生 appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かのじょはゆうしゅうながくせいだ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, na-adjective (優秀な), だ copula. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple descriptive sentence. Vocabulary 優秀 is somewhat advanced but structure is N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with na-adjective modification.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 学生 appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かのじょはまじめながくせいです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, na-adjective (真面目な), です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple descriptive sentence with na-adjective.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for describing people.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 部屋 appears in 隣の部屋.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: となりのへやがうるさいのです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, が particle, i-adjective (うるさい), のです explanatory. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Explanatory のです adds slight complexity. Practical complaint phrase.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with explanatory ending.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 部屋 appears in 勉強部屋 (study room).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かのじょはべんきょうへやからでていった。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, から particle, te-form (出て), ta-form (行った). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Compound verb construction with から. Good practice.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with compound directional verb.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 部屋 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: このへやはせんせいがたにつかわれています。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form 使われています (is being used). Passive forms and ている are both N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level. Passive and ている.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 passive form and ている. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昼御飯 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ひるごはんをたべましょう。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, ましょう form (let's). Basic ましょう for suggestions is acceptable N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple invitation/suggestion. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for suggestions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昼御飯 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ひるごはんはなににしますか。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, question word 何, に particle, します, か. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Question about choices/decisions. Practical.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for meal decision questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昼御飯 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはひるごはんをたべていません。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (食べていません - have not eaten). This is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 痛い appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あしがいたい。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: が particle, i-adjective. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple body sensation statement. Perfect for beginners.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for body sensations.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 痛い appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あたまがいたいです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: が particle, i-adjective, です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple complaint about pain. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Perfect simple N5 example for expressing pain.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 痛い appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: はがいたいです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: が particle, i-adjective, です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple dental pain statement. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for toothache.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 右 appears in 右側 (right side).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: みぎがわにまがってください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle, te-form (曲がって), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Directional instruction. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for giving directions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 右 appears in 右手 (right hand).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはみぎてできます。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential form できます (can do). Potential forms are N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to potential form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 potential form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 右 appears in 右足 (right foot).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かのじょはみぎあしをけがした。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, を particle, ta-form (けがした). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple past action with injury. Clear structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for describing injuries.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 左 appears in 左手 (left hand).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ひだりてにもってください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle, te-form (持って), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple polite request with hand specification.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for instructions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 左 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ひだりにまがってください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle, te-form (曲がって), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple directional instruction. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for giving directions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 左 appears in 左側 (left side).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ひだりがわをあるいてください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle (path), te-form (歩いて), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Direction instruction with を for path. Good grammar point.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for walking directions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鉛筆 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: えんぴつでかいてください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: で particle (instrument), te-form (書いて), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple request with instrument で. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for instrument usage.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鉛筆 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: えんぴつがみつかりません。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential/spontaneous form 見つかりません (cannot be found/is not found). This is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to potential form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 potential/spontaneous form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鉛筆 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: えんぴつはどこですか。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, question word どこ, です, か. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple location question. Perfect for beginners.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for location questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入る appears in te-form 入って.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: へやにはいってください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle, te-form (入って), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple polite request. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for polite requests.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入る appears in ta-form 入った.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはへやにはいった。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, に particle, ta-form (入った). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple past action. Clear and direct.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for past tense.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入る appears in te-form 入って.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはへやにはいってきた。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, に particle, te-form (入って), directional auxiliary (来た). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Compound directional verb. Good for teaching direction.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with directional auxiliary verb.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 飲む appears in nai-form 飲まない.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはこーひーをのまない。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, を particle, nai-form (飲まない). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple negative statement. Clear and practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for negative statements.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 飲む appears in masu-form 飲みます.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: まいあさこーひーをのみます。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, masu-form (飲みます). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple habitual action. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for daily routines.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 飲む appears in ta-form 飲んだ.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはみずをのんだ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, を particle, ta-form (飲んだ). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple past action. Perfect for beginners.
verification.overall_notes: Perfect simple N5 example for past tense.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入れる appears in te-form 入れて.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ばすけっとにたくさんの花をいれて、とーにすわっていました。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (座っていました - was sitting). Progressive ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level. Complex sentence with ている.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入れる appears in te-form 入れて.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そのはこにえんぴつをいれてください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle, を particle, te-form (入れて), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Polite request with location and object. Good practice.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for requests to put things in containers.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 入れる appears in te-form 入れて.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ほんをかばんにいれてください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, に particle, te-form (入れて), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Polite request with clear object-location. Practical.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for putting objects in containers.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 乗る appears in dictionary form modifying 電車.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ほら、あなたののるでんしゃがきたわ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, dictionary form modifier (乗る), が particle, ta-form (来た), わ particle. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-high N5. Relative clause modification with dictionary form. More complex structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with relative clause, though somewhat advanced.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 乗る appears in masu-form 乗ります.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: まいにちどこでばすにのりますか。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: question word どこ, で particle, に particle, masu-form, か. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Question about daily routine with location. Practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for transportation questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 乗る appears in ta-form.
verification.kana_notes: Error: じょうった should be のった. The verb 乗る becomes のった in ta-form, not じょうった.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, まで particle, に particle, ta-form. Grammar is N5 but kana is wrong.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5 structurally.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error. 乗った should be のった not じょうった.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 弟 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはひとりのおとうとがいます。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, の particle, が particle, います. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Family existence sentence with counter. Good practice.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for family members.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 弟 appears in 彼の弟.
verification.kana_notes: Error: かのおとうと should be かれのおとうと. The kanji 彼の should be かれの not かの.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, は particle, とても adverb, よく adverb, dictionary form. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple statement about study habits.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error. 彼の should be かれの not かの.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 弟 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: おとうとはわたしよりせがたかい。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, より (comparison), が particle, i-adjective. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Comparison sentence with より. Good structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for comparisons.

verification.target_vocab_notes: あなた appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あなたはしゃつをあべこべにきている。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (着ている - are wearing). State ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: あなた appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ほら、あなたののるでんしゃがきたわ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, dictionary form modifier (乗る), が particle, ta-form. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-high N5. Relative clause with dictionary form modifier.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example though somewhat complex with relative clause.

verification.target_vocab_notes: あなた appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはもうあなたにむちゅう、めろめろなのよ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, もう adverb, に particle, na-adjective (夢中), のよ ending. Grammar is N5 though vocabulary is advanced/colloquial.
verification.difficulty_notes: Upper N5. Colloquial expressions 夢中 and メロメロ are quite advanced. Romantic context.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5 but vocabulary (夢中、メロメロ) is advanced and colloquial. Borderline.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 千 appears in 千人 (thousand people).
verification.kana_notes: Error: せんにんものにん should be せんにんものひと. The second 人 should be ひと not にん. Also 'もの人' is redundant.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: も particle (emphasis), が particle, ta-form (いた). Grammar is N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-high N5. Large number with emphasis particle.
verification.overall_notes: Kana error with 人 reading. Also もの人 seems redundant.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 千 appears in 千人.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: せいとはぜんぶでやくせんにんです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, で particle, 約 (about), です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Approximate quantity expression. Good for numbers practice.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for approximate quantities.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 緑 appears in みどり銀行 (Midori Bank - proper name).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはみどりぎんこうにいってきたところなんです。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ところ pattern (行ってきたところ - have just). This temporal pattern is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ところ pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ところ pattern. Also みどり here is a proper name, not the color.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 緑 appears as color modifier.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そのみどりのしゃつをみせてください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, を particle, te-form (見せて), ください. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple request with color specification. Practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for requesting items by color.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 緑 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: このはこのそとはみどりだがなかはあかである。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains が adversative conjunction (but). This complex が is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to adversative が.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 adversative が conjunction. Too complex for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 緑 appears in みどり銀行 (proper name).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはみどりぎんこうにいってきたところなんです。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ところ pattern. N4 grammar. Duplicate of example_index 0.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level.
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of example_index 0. Contains N4 ところ pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 軽い appears in idiomatic expression 口が軽い (talkative/can't keep secrets).
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かのじょはくちがかるい。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, が particle, i-adjective. Grammar is N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Upper N5. Idiomatic expression 口が軽い is quite advanced and metaphorical.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5 but 口が軽い is an idiom that's challenging for beginners.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 軽い appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはかるいくつがすきだ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, が particle, na-adjective (好き), だ. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple preference statement with i-adjective modifier.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for expressing preferences.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 軽い appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしのこーとはかるいがあたたかい。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains が adversative conjunction (but). This complex が is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to adversative が.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 adversative が conjunction. Too complex for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: あまり appears in the middle with negative.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: このてのほんはあまりよまない。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, は particle, あまり + negative (not much). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Negative with あまり. Expression この手の is slightly advanced.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for あまり with negative.

verification.target_vocab_notes: あまり appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あまりそれをはなにかけるな。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, な negative imperative. Grammar is technically N5 though imperative is advanced.
verification.difficulty_notes: Upper N5. Idiomatic expression 鼻にかける (to boast) and negative imperative な.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5 but idiom 鼻にかける is quite advanced. Imperative な is also challenging.

verification.target_vocab_notes: あまり appears in the middle with negative.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: せいとはあまりてをあげません。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, あまり + negative (not much), を particle, masu negative. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Negative with あまり. Expression 手を挙げる is common.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for あまり with negative in classroom context.
